taxonomy: Baeolepis nervosa is a fossil plant species. Baeolepis nervosa is classified within the plant group known as the Equisetales, which includes horsetails. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its jointed stems and whorled leaves. The Equisetales are a group of vascular plants that have been around since the Devonian period. Baeolepis nervosa specifically is considered a member of the family Equisetaceae.
